pi_items.source: Task description states 'existing Wireless Bluetooth Headphones (SKU: WBH-001)', setup_task.sh defines SOURCE_SKU='WBH-001', export_result.sh uses same value
Task description explicitly states 'Create a new product listing for Refurbished Wireless Bluetooth Headphones', export_result.sh defines TARGET_NAME='Refurbished Wireless Bluetooth Headphones'
Task description states 'SKU: WBH-001-REF', setup_task.sh defines TARGET_SKU='WBH-001-REF', export_result.sh uses same value, verifier.py expects 'WBH-001-REF'
Task description states 'Regular Price: $49.99', verifier.py expects price='49.99' with float comparison (line 81)
Task description states 'Stock Quantity: 50', verifier.py expects stock='50' with integer comparison (line 91)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a refurbished product based on source SKU WBH-001. The target product must have SKU WBH-001-REF, name 'Refurbished Wireless Bluetooth Headphones', regular price $49.99, and stock quantity of 50. The product must be published and inherit description/categories/image from the source product. The verifier checks product existence with correct SKU, price, stock, published status, description inheritance from source, and creation timestamp during task window.
